vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác (thứ gì đó cực kỳ đẹp)
vocab.example: The intricate gothic architecture in Paris is a true feast for the eyes, making it impossible not to take photos.

vocab.meaning: khác biệt, không phù hợp với bối cảnh xung quanh
vocab.example: I love capturing modern skyscrapers that seem a bit out of character in the middle of a historic district.

vocab.meaning: những nơi hẻo lánh, ít người biết đến
vocab.example: I prefer wandering off the beaten track to find hidden architectural gems that haven't been over-photographed.
I'm fascinated by ancient temples that have stood the test of time and still look magnificent in pictures.

vocab.meaning: mọi ngóc ngách, mọi kẽ hở
vocab.example: When I find a beautiful cathedral, I try to photograph every nook and cranny to capture its full essence.
The panoramic view of the skyline at night was so breathtaking that I took dozens of photos.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong nháy mắt (diễn tả việc bắt trọn khoảnh khắc ánh sáng)
vocab.example: The golden hour light can disappear in the blink of an eye, so I have to be quick with my camera.

vocab.meaning: để mắt tới, canh chừng để tìm thấy thứ gì
vocab.example: Whenever I travel, I always keep an eye out for unique balconies or ornate doors to add to my collection.

vocab.meaning: rất phổ biến, là mốt (dùng cho xu hướng kiến trúc)
vocab.example: Minimalist concrete designs are all the rage right now, and they look incredibly sleek in minimalist photography.

vocab.meaning: luôn lưu tâm hoặc cố gắng làm việc gì đó
vocab.example: I make a point of taking photos of heritage buildings before they are demolished or renovated.
